project_area: Wildlife habitat improvement projects, including pollinator habitat, rain gardens, wildlife-focused plantings, riparian buffers, early successional habitat, aquatic habitat, and turtle habitat in priority areas
demographic_requirements: None specified beyond geographic and land size restrictions
eligibility_summary: Private landowners or stewards in Cheshire County, NH with tracts of land 25 acres or less in total. Projects must improve wildlife habitat and demonstrate long-term maintenance, landowner inputs, regional ecology awareness, and potential for community education partnerships.
